history.content:
<thought>
I am facing north (up). The cell directly in front is lava, so I cannot move forward. The goal is to the northeast, at (row4, col5). I can move right to a floor cell at (row6, col4). To do that, I need to turn clockwise to face east, then move forward. After that, I can continue moving right to (row6, col5) and then go up to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I can see that the cell directly in front of me (north) is a floor cell '.', not lava. The goal is located to the north-west. I can move forward to advance towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is located two cells to the left and one cell up from my current position. The cell directly in front of me (north) is a floor cell, which is safe. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal. After that, I can turn left and move west to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up, but there is a wall directly in front. The goal is to my left (west), two cells away. The cell immediately to my left is empty floor. I need to turn counter-clockwise to face west, then move towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly in front is a floor cell (.) at row6, column4. Beyond that, two steps ahead is the goal O at row5, column4. The path is clear, so moving forward is safe and progresses towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>O objetivo está diretamente à minha frente, a uma célula de distância. Não há lava ou parede bloqueando o caminho. Vou avançar.</thought>
<action>FRENTE</action>
